lastfmReauth.title: Last.fm session expired
lastfmReauth.message: Your scrobbles are no longer being sent. Sign in again to resume.

available.title: Update available (v{{version}})
available.message: A new version of WaveFlow is ready to install.

installed.title: Update installed
installed.message: Restart WaveFlow to apply the new version.

welcome.title: Welcome to WaveFlow
welcome.description: Your personal local-first music player. Enjoy your entire library without a streaming subscription.

localOnly.title: Important: local music only
localOnly.description: WaveFlow is NOT a streaming service. It plays files that already exist on your device.
localOnly.bulletOwn: Bring your own library (MP3, FLAC, ALAC, OGG, DSD…)
localOnly.bulletImport: Import a folder or drag-and-drop files
localOnly.bulletScrobble: Connect Last.fm to scrobble plays in the background

folder.title: Pick your music folder
folder.description: Tell WaveFlow where your music lives. The scanner will organise your library automatically.
folder.placeholder: Click to choose your music folder

autoAnalyze.title: Auto-analyse tracks
autoAnalyze.description: Detect BPM and key during scanning — powers Radio and Mood Radio.

lastfm.title: Connect Last.fm
lastfm.description: Scrobbling sends your plays to your Last.fm profile. You get artist bios and similar-artist suggestions back, right inside the app.
lastfm.keyHint: Create an API key on Last.fm
lastfm.missingFields: Please fill in the API key, secret, username and password.
lastfm.connectedSubtitle: Scrobbling kicks in automatically once you play a track.

scan.title: Scan your library
scan.description: Ready to analyse your folder and discover your tracks?
scan.readyHint: Your folder is set. Start the scan whenever you're ready.

done.title: You're all set!
done.description: Your library has been scanned and is ready to play.
done.bulletExplore: Explore your library via the Library, Albums and Artists tabs
done.bulletQueue: Build your first queue by clicking on a track
done.bulletSettings: Fine-tune things from the sidebar (Appearance, Integrations…)

language.title: Pick your language
language.description: WaveFlow ships in 17 languages. We pre-selected the one your system uses — switch if we got it wrong.
language.fallback: We couldn't match your system language, so we defaulted to English. Pick yours below.

profile.title: Name your profile
profile.description: WaveFlow uses profiles to separate libraries. Give this one a name you'll recognise later.
profile.hint: You can create additional profiles later if needed.
profile.unavailable: Profile unavailable — please try again in a moment.

search.placeholder: Search for a song, an artist, an album...

banner.subtitle: Discover your favourite music and explore new sounds.

sleep.title: Sleep
sleep.subtitle: Very slow and quiet for falling asleep

recentlyPlayed.title: Recently played
recentlyPlayed.emptyDescription: Play a track to have it appear here. Your listening history builds up as you discover new music.

dailyMix.title: For you
dailyMix.emptyDescription: Listen to a few tracks then click Regenerate to create your personalised mixes.
dailyMix.label: Daily Mix

wrapped.title: Your {{year}} recap
wrapped.subtitle: Your artists, your minutes, your year — told in a few slides.

morceaux.title: Empty library
morceaux.description: Import audio files or a folder to populate your library.

albums.title: No albums found
albums.description: Import audio files to automatically create albums.

artistes.title: No artists found
artistes.description: Import some audio files to get started.

genres.title: No genres found
genres.description: Import audio files to explore different genres.

dossiers.title: No folders imported
dossiers.description: Import a folder from the action bar to browse it here.

liked.title: Liked tracks
liked.emptyDescription: Tracks you like will appear here. Browse your library and like your favourite tracks.

history.title: Listening history
history.emptyDescription: Play a track — it'll show up here as soon as it counts.

recent.title: Recently played
recent.emptyDescription: Tracks you listen to will appear here automatically.

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.emptyDescription: Play some music to start seeing your listening stats appear here.

heatmap.title: Yearly activity
heatmap.empty: No listening yet over the past 12 months.

empty.title: No listening history yet
empty.subtitle: Play some tracks and come back later — your Wrapped builds itself as you listen.

mood.subtitle: The rhythm that drove your year

outro.title: Thanks for listening with WaveFlow
outro.subtitle: Keep exploring — your Wrapped updates in real time.

credits.text: Designed and developed with passion. Built using open-source technologies.
credits.icons: Icons by Lucide, Phosphor, Mynaui, and Iconify.

hero.title: Help us improve WaveFlow
hero.description: Spotted a bug, have an idea for improvement, or just want to share feedback? We read every message and take your suggestions into account.

contact.subtitle: Bug, suggestion or question — we read every message

queue.title: Play queue
queue.emptyDescription: Play a track from your library to fill the queue.

spotifyQueue.emptyHint: Nothing in the Spotify queue right now.
spotifyQueue.readonlyHint: Read-only queue — manage it from the Spotify app.

select.title: Who's listening?
select.subtitle: Select your profile to find your libraries and playlists

create.title: New profile
create.subtitle: Create a profile to personalise your experience

manage.title: Manage profiles
manage.subtitle: Select a profile to remove. The active profile cannot be deleted from here.

delete.title: Delete {{name}}?
delete.subtitle: This profile will be permanently removed.
delete.warning: All libraries, playlists and listening history for this profile will be lost. This action cannot be undone.

playlistModal.title: New playlist
playlistModal.coverAutoHint: Auto cover — updates with the contents

playlistView.emptyDescription: Add tracks from your libraries using the + button on each row.
playlistView.noneDescription: Select a playlist from the sidebar to view it here.
playlistView.notFoundDescription: This playlist no longer exists in the active profile.

batchTagEdit.title: Batch edit tags
batchTagEdit.subtitle: {{count}} tracks selected
batchTagEdit.help: Tick the fields you want propagated to every track. Unticked fields stay per-track untouched.

albumDetail.emptyDescription: This album is no longer available in the active profile.
albumDetail.emptyTracksDescription: This album does not contain any available tracks.

artistDetail.emptyDescription: This artist is no longer listed in the active profile.

genreDetail.emptyDescription: This genre no longer exists in the active profile.
genreDetail.emptyTracksDescription: This genre contains no available tracks.

nowPlaying.title: Now playing
nowPlaying.noBio: No biography available. Set your Last.fm key in the settings.

lyrics.title: Lyrics
lyrics.notFound: No lyrics found for this track. You can import a .lrc file.

toast.tagWriteSkipped: TTML kept in cache only (not written to the audio tag)

abLoop.setA: A-B repeat: set point A at the current position

tree.sectionHint: Combine conditions with AND / OR / NOT. Click AND or OR to flip the group operator.

lyricsEditor.title: Lyrics editor
lyricsEditor.plainPlaceholder: Type the lyrics line by line…
lyricsEditor.captureHint: Start playback then press Space (or Capture) to anchor the current line to the playhead
lyricsEditor.writeToFile: Also write to the audio file (USLT/LYRICS)

offset.label: Global shift
offset.help: Shifts every captured line by the same delta — useful for fixing imported LRC files that are uniformly early or late

lyricsEditor.captureHintWord: Space = next word · Enter = next line · Backspace = undo last word

settings.title: Settings

shortcuts.subtitle: Click a shortcut then press the key combination you want. Backspace to clear, Escape to cancel.

offlineMode.title: Offline mode
offlineMode.subtitle: Disables Last.fm, Deezer and LRCLIB. Uses cached data only.

lastfm.title: Last.fm
lastfm.subtitle: Artist bios and scrobbling. Create a key at last.fm/api/account/create
lastfm.loginPrompt: Sign in to scrobble your listening history:

discord.title: Discord Rich Presence
discord.subtitle: Show the currently playing track on your Discord profile

dlna.title: DLNA / UPnP server
dlna.subtitle: Stream your library to LAN-compatible amplifiers and devices

spotify.title: Spotify
spotify.subtitle: Connect Spotify Premium with your own Spotify Developer Client ID.
spotify.redirectHint: Add this Redirect URI in Spotify Developer Dashboard: http://127.0.0.1:49387/spotify/callback

normalize.title: Normalise volume
normalize.subtitle: Lower the volume of tracks that are too loud to keep a consistent level

replayGain.title: Apply ReplayGain
replayGain.subtitle: Use each track's analysed gain to balance perceived volume

exclusive.title: WASAPI exclusive mode (Windows)
exclusive.subtitle: Bit-perfect: bypass the Windows mixer for interference-free output. Falls back to shared mode if the device rejects exclusive access.
exclusive.fallback: The device doesn't accept exclusive mode. Falling back to shared mode.

mono.title: Mono audio
mono.subtitle: Mixes the left and right channels into a single signal

autoStart.title: Launch at startup
autoStart.subtitle: Automatically launch WaveFlow when the system starts up

minimizeToTray.title: Minimise to the system tray
minimizeToTray.subtitle: Closing the window minimises the application to the system tray

singleClickPlay.title: Single-click playback
singleClickPlay.subtitle: Click a track to start playback (otherwise double-click)

showSleepTimer.title: Pin sleep timer in the bar
showSleepTimer.subtitle: When off, the timer stays available from the « … » menu

showAbLoop.title: Pin A-B loop in the bar
showAbLoop.subtitle: When off, A-B loop stays available from the « … » menu

showSpotify.title: Show Spotify entry
showSpotify.subtitle: Show the Spotify shortcut in the sidebar

duplicates.title: Detect duplicates
duplicates.subtitle: Find byte-identical files (same blake3) in your library

rescan.title: Rescan the library
rescan.subtitle: Review all folders and import new files

analyze.title: Analyse the library
analyze.subtitle: Compute BPM, loudness and peak for non-analysed tracks
analyze.autoSubtitle: Run analysis in the background after each scan that adds new tracks

artistImages.title: Artist images
artistImages.subtitle: Download the artist images from Deezer

localArtistImages.title: Local artist images
localArtistImages.subtitle: Look for an artist.jpg (or <name>.jpg) next to your music and use it as the artist photo.
localArtistImages.done: {{linked}} of {{considered}} artists linked to a local image

profileIo.title: Profile backup
profileIo.subtitle: Export or import a full profile (playlists, likes, stats, EQ, shortcuts) as a single .waveflow file.

export.failed: Export failed. See the logs for details.

import.done: Profile imported (id {{id}}). Switch to it from the profile selector.
import.failed: Import failed. The file may be corrupt or incompatible.

dataFolder.title: Data folder
dataFolder.subtitle: Open the folder containing the database and the covers

lyricsPrefetch.title: Prefetch lyrics
lyricsPrefetch.subtitle: Download lyrics for the entire library for offline use

settings.regenerateThumbnailsSubtitle: Rebuild the missing 1x/2x variants for all covers

reset.title: Reset the app
reset.subtitle: Delete all data and restore to factory settings

diagnostics.title: Application log
diagnostics.subtitle: To report a bug, open the logs folder or copy recent logs and paste them into a ticket.

visualizer.title: Audio visualizer
visualizer.subtitle: Show a real-time spectrum in the immersive view (lightweight FFT on the decoder thread)

smartCrossfade.title: Smart crossfade
smartCrossfade.subtitle: Automatically skip the fade between two tracks from the same album (great for concept records and live sets)

dynamicCrossfade.title: Dynamic crossfade
dynamicCrossfade.subtitle: Scales fade duration with the tempo gap between tracks (falls back to the fixed crossfade when BPM is unknown)

gapless.title: Gapless playback
gapless.subtitle: Chain consecutive tracks with no micro-silence (great for live and concept albums)

equalizer.title: Equalizer
equalizer.subtitle: Six peaking bands, ±12 dB. Drag the dots to shape the curve.

backup.title: Automatic backup
backup.subtitle: Periodically creates a .waveflow archive of every profile in the chosen folder.
backup.includeMetadataArtworkHint: Larger backup, fully offline restore. Uncheck for lean archives (cache will be re-fetched on demand).

errors.loadFailed: Could not load the backup configuration.

uiZoom.title: UI zoom
uiZoom.subtitle: Scale the whole interface (Ctrl+= / Ctrl+- / Ctrl+0 also work)

showAudioQualityFooter.title: Show audio quality strip
showAudioQualityFooter.subtitle: Technical details (kHz, kbps, codec, bit depth) under the player bar. Off by default for a slimmer bar.

placeholder.title: Theme picker ships in v1.3
placeholder.subtitle: 10 presets (Emerald, Midnight, OLED, Forest, Sunset…) that retint the entire app instantly. Stay tuned.

playerBarLayout.title: Player bar layout
playerBarLayout.subtitle: Choose which buttons appear in the bar and what clicking the cover thumbnail does. The preview updates live.
playerBarLayout.previewEmpty: No buttons — the bar will only show the cover and the playback controls.

immersive.label: Open the immersive view
immersive.description: Default — opens the full-screen Now Playing card with the cover blown up.

nowPlaying.label: Show the Now Playing panel
nowPlaying.description: Spotify-style — opens or closes the right-edge panel with the cover and lyrics.

none.label: Do nothing
none.description: Disable the click entirely — handy if you keep triggering it by accident.

spotify.notConfiguredMessage: Spotify requires every third-party app to register a free Client ID before any playback. Create one on the Spotify Developer dashboard, then paste it in WaveFlow's Settings → Integrations.
spotify.notConnectedMessage: Your Client ID is set. Sign in to your Spotify Premium account from Settings to load your playlists and play music.
spotify.emptyPlaylist: No tracks available in this playlist (Spotify may not expose local files or playlists you don't own).
